task: Check the specifications of the best-selling HP FHD laptop with 16 GB RAM and core i7 running on Windows 11.
final_result_response:
Here are the complete specifications for the **best-selling HP FHD laptop with 16GB RAM, Core i7, and Windows 11** on Best Buy:

---

## **HP - 17.3" Full HD Laptop - Intel Core i7 1355U 2023 - 16GB Memory - 1TB SSD - Natural Silver**
**Model:** 17-cn3327dx | **SKU:** 11952055 | **Rating:** ⭐ 4.7 (401 reviews) | **Price:** $688.00 (Save $211.99)

---

### 📺 Display
| Spec | Value |
|---|---|
| Screen Type | IPS |
| Screen Size | 17.3 inches |
| Resolution | 1920 x 1080 (Full HD) |
| Display Type | LED |
| Display Surface | Anti-glare |
| Brightness | 250 nits |
| Color Gamut (NTSC) | 45% |
| Touch Screen | No |

### ⚙️ Processor
| Spec | Value |
|---|---|
| Processor | Intel 13th Gen Core i7-1355U |
| Boost Clock | 5 GHz |
| Cores | 10-core |
| L3 Cache | 12 MB |
| NPU | No |

### 🧠 Memory
| Spec | Value |
|---|---|
| RAM | 16 GB DDR4 |
| RAM Speed | 3200 MHz |

### 💾 Storage
| Spec | Value |
|---|---|
| Type | SSD (PCIe) |
| Capacity | 1024 GB (1 TB) |

### 🎮 Graphics
| Spec | Value |
|---|---|
| Type | Integrated |
| GPU | Intel Iris Xe Graphics |

### 💻 Operating System: **Windows 11 Home**

### 🔌 Connectivity
- **HDMI:** 1 x HDMI 1.4
- **USB:** 1 x USB-A 3.0, 2 x USB-C 3.0 (3 total)
- **Headphone Jack / Mic Input:** Yes
- **Wireless:** Bluetooth, Wi-Fi 6
- **Ethernet:** None

### 🔋 Power
- **Battery Life:** Up to 10 hours
- **Battery:** 3-cell Lithium-ion polymer
- **Power Supply:** 45 watts

### 📷 Camera
- **Front Camera:** 720p | **Built-in Mic:** Yes

### 📐 Dimensions & Weight
- **Height:** 0.78" | **Width:** 15.78" | **Depth:** 10.15" | **Weight:** 4.6 lbs

### Other Features
- Windows AI Copilot, Privacy Camera, HD Audio Stereo Speakers
- No backlit keyboard, No media card reader
- **Year of Release:** 2025, **Color:** Natural Silver
